stemHtml: Before the INS alignment the pilot accidentally provides the system with an INCORRECT value of latitude. What is the consequence of this action?

options.a: The system will start up in ATT REF mode, providing attitude data, but NOT navigation data.
options.b: Nothing. The system will compensate for such errors, but the initial alignment process will take longer.
options.c: The system will only function correctly when flying east-west, NOT north-south.
options.d: The system will gradually lose its alignment, as the calculated drift due to Earth rotation will be wrong.
